stemHtml: According to TEM (Threat and Error Management) model, environmental threats can cause influences…

options.a: which have only little impact on the actual flight operation, because they affect the environment in general.
options.b: which are NOT related to the actual flight, such as climate change and global warming.
options.c: which occur during actual operations. They can be related to weather, terrain, and airport features.
options.d: of actual flight operations on the environment, such as noise and pollution.
